tests.scenario: Play a meditation session without app crashing
steps: Hit play and let play run for 5 minutes
tests.expected_result: App allows for meditation to play without crashing or freezing.
tests.notes: Rewrote from T2. Changed from 30 minutes to 5 minutes.  More realistic time to test without crashing.

tests.scenario: Navigate between screens without crashes
tests.expected_result: App does not crash while navigating between screens.
tests.notes: New test created for requirement FR_1.  Auto tests did not cover screen navigation within the app.

tests.scenario: Content should load within 10 seconds on wifi
steps: Hit play and time how long it takes until it starts
tests.expected_result: Meditation will start playing within 10 seconds of opening the app.
tests.notes: New test for new requirement.  Using the 10 second limit from FR_2.

tests.scenario: Content should load within 10 seconds on mobile data
steps: Turn off wifi and use mobile data
Hit play and time the start of the meditation
tests.expected_result: Content will load within 10 seconds with mobile data connected.
tests.notes: Second test for FR_2 to ensure content loads within 10 seconds on mobile data.

tests.scenario: App performance after update should not get worse
steps: Note performance of the app before updating
Update the app to the latest version
tests.expected_result: Performance should be just as good or better than before the update was performed.
tests.notes: New test for requirement FR_3.  Based on H1 review complaints that the update made the app worse.

tests.scenario: After update, app should not crash
steps: Attempt to open different types of content in the app
tests.expected_result: App should not crash, same as before the update.
tests.notes: Second test for requirement FR_3 to ensure that there are no crashes after the app is updated.

tests.scenario: Price and billing visible without clicking
steps: Do not scroll or click on anything
Check if subscription price and billing information is visible
tests.expected_result: All subscription information (price, billing cycle, auto-renewal) is visible on the subscription screen.
tests.notes: Improved from T5.  Specifically checking what information should be visible on subscription page.

tests.scenario: No hidden fees in subscription page
steps: See if there are additional fees mentioned
tests.expected_result: No additional fees. Price is visible and accurate.
tests.notes: New test for requirement FR_4.  Checking for hidden fees which H1 reviews complain about.

tests.scenario: Can cancel subscription in app
steps: Look to see if there is a button to cancel the subscription
tests.expected_result: Button to cancel the subscription is visible in the app.
tests.notes: Rewrote from T7.  Changed to only checking if cancel is within the app as that is what H2 reviews requested.  Removed time limit.

tests.scenario: Subscription gets cancelled when cancelling
steps: Confirm and check if it says subscription cancelled
tests.expected_result: Subscription gets cancelled.  App shows subscription is cancelled.
tests.notes: Test that fully cancels the subscription to ensure it works.  Previously only tested if button was visible.

tests.scenario: Can cancel trial and not get charged
steps: Complete a trial of the subscription
Wait for trial period to end
tests.expected_result: Free trial will not get charged after being cancelled.
tests.notes: NEW test for requirement FR_6.  H2 reviews complain about being charged for the subscription after cancelling their trial.

tests.scenario: Can cancel paid subscription and not get charged
steps: Wait for the next billing date
tests.expected_result: Paid subscription will not get charged after being cancelled.
tests.notes: Second test for requirement FR_6 to ensure paid subscription does not get charged.

tests.scenario: Search for content in app
steps: Type in a keyword and look for results
tests.expected_result: Search bar returns relevant content.
tests.notes: Simplified from T13.  Removed requirement to search 2 clicks in.  Just checking that search works.

tests.scenario: Search returns correct type of content
steps: Search for a specific content type (ex: anxiety)
Check results for content of that type
tests.expected_result: Search returns content that matches the keyword searched for.
tests.notes: Ensuring search function works as H3 review complain about it.

tests.scenario: Home screen should not be too cluttered
steps: Open the app to the home screen
Count the number of horizontal scroll sections
Check that each category has a clear label
tests.expected_result: No more than 3 horizontal scroll sections.  Each scroll has a clear label.
tests.notes: NEW test for requirement FR_8.  H3 reviews complain about the cluttered screens in the app.  Limit of 3 sections stated in requirement.

tests.scenario: Main options visible on home screen
tests.expected_result: All main options for the app are visible on the home screen.
tests.notes: Test to ensure home screen is not too overwhelming like H3 reviews say it is.

tests.scenario: Played downloaded content while in airplane mode
tests.expected_result: Downloaded meditation will play without issues while in airplane mode.  Does not need to connect to wifi.
tests.notes: Rewrote from T4.  Changed to using airplane mode instead of waiting 30 days for downloaded content to work.

tests.scenario: Sleep content can be played without wifi
steps: Turn off wifi and mobile data
tests.expected_result: Downloaded sleep content will play without needing wifi connection.
tests.notes: Testing to ensure both meditation and sleep content can be played offline.

tests.scenario: Downloads remain after app update
steps: Update the app to the latest version
Attempt to play one of the downloaded items
tests.expected_result: All downloaded content still visible and playable offline after app update.
tests.notes: NEW test for requirement FR_10.  H4 reviews complain about downloaded content disappearing after app update.

tests.scenario: Old downloads still work after app update
tests.expected_result: Old downloaded content will still work when going offline after app is updated.
tests.notes: Testing to ensure downloaded content still works when going offline after app is updated.

tests.scenario: Can see what data is collected by app
steps: Find the privacy or data settings
Check what data is collected by the app
tests.expected_result: App will show what data is collected by the app and visible in settings.
tests.notes: Improved from T16.  Test to realistically check if data collected is visible.

tests.scenario: Can opt out of app sharing data with ads
steps: Find data sharing or advertising settings
Check if toggle exists to stop sharing data
tests.expected_result: Toggle to opt out of sharing data with advertisements will be visible.
tests.notes: Based on the data sharing opt out requirement (FR_11) that H5 reviews request.

tests.scenario: Check if app consents to using AI data
steps: Look for consent to use AI data
tests.expected_result: If app utilizes AI data, it will ask for consent to use that data.
tests.notes: NEW test for requirement FR_12.  H5 reviews mention concern for AI data collection.

tests.scenario: App does not use AI data without consent
steps: Check if app uses AI features
See if it asked for consent to use data
tests.expected_result: App will not use AI data without the user agreeing to it.
tests.notes: Testing to ensure app does not use AI data without consent like H5 reviews mention.
